ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the plugin will not automatically serialize queries when files are created, modified, or renamed. You can still manually serialize queries using the command palette.
ast.target: 启用后，插件不会在文件创建、修改或重命名时自动序列化查询。您仍然可以使用命令面板手动序列化查询。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, a refresh button will be displayed next to each serialized Dataview query.
ast.target: 启用后，每个已序列化的 Dataview 查询旁将显示一个刷新按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, JavaScript-based Dataview queries can be serialized to static markdown. Note: JavaScript code cannot contain "--" due to HTML comment limitations.
ast.target: 启用后，基于 JavaScript 的 Dataview 查询可以序列化为静态 Markdown。注意：由于 HTML 注释限制，JavaScript 代码不能包含 \"--\"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, a notification popup will be displayed when a query fails to serialize.
ast.target: 启用后，当查询序列化失败时将显示通知弹窗。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, an empty line will be added between the serialized content and the END marker. Useful for static site generators like Jekyll that require blank lines after tables or lists.
ast.target: 启用后，将在序列化内容和 END 标记之间添加一个空行。适用于需要在表格或列表后添加空行的静态站点生成器（如 Jekyll）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, verbose debug messages will be logged to the console. Useful for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 启用后，详细的调试消息将记录到控制台。用于故障排除。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 刷新 Dataview 查询失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The Dataview plugin is not installed or enabled. Please make sure it is installed and enabled, then restart Obsidian
ast.target: Dataview 插件未安装或未启用。请确保它已安装并启用，然后重启 Obsidian

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The active file is not a Markdown file
ast.target: 活动文件不是 Markdown 文件

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Dataview serializer block inserted. Replace "LIST FROM #foo" with your query.
ast.target: Dataview 序列化块已插入。将 \"LIST FROM #foo\" 替换为您的查询。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Dataview queries found in selection
ast.target: 在选择中未找到 Dataview 查询

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Dataview query found at cursor. Place cursor inside a ```dataview block or inline query.
ast.target: 在光标处未找到 Dataview 查询。请将光标放在 ```dataview 块或内联查询内。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Converted Dataview query to serialized format
ast.target: 已将 Dataview 查询转换为序列化格式

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Dataview queries found in the current file
ast.target: 在当前文件中未找到 Dataview 查询

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Dataview serializer queries found in the current file
ast.target: 在当前文件中未找到 Dataview 序列化查询

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folders to scan when looking for queries to serialize.
ast.target: 查找要序列化的查询时扫描的文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folders to ignore when processing added/modified files.
ast.target: 处理添加/修改的文件时忽略的文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folders containing files that should be updated when ANY file in the vault changes. Useful for index files with queries that aggregate data from elsewhere.
ast.target: 包含文件的文件夹，当保险库中的任何文件发生更改时，这些文件应更新。适用于包含从其他地方聚合数据的查询的索引文件。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Scan and serialize all Dataview queries
ast.target: 扫描并序列化所有 Dataview 查询

ast.name: name
ast.source: Scan and serialize Dataview queries in current file
ast.target: 扫描并序列化当前文件中的 Dataview 查询

ast.name: name
ast.source: Convert Dataview query at cursor to serialized format
ast.target: 将光标处的 Dataview 查询转换为序列化格式

ast.name: name
ast.source: Convert all Dataview queries in current file to serialized format
ast.target: 将当前文件中的所有 Dataview 查询转换为序列化格式

ast.name: name
ast.source: Remove all queries from current file
ast.target: 从当前文件中移除所有查询

ast.name: text
ast.source: Buy me a coffee to support the development of this plugin
ast.target: 请我喝杯咖啡以支持此插件的开发
